purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Stage 17 completed: DB observability and backups. PostgreSQL on db is monitored with node_exporter/postgres_exporter, logs are shipped to Loki via Promtail, Grafana has DB panels, DB alerts are deployed, and supportdesk pg_dump backups are automated with restore test proof.
last_completed_stage: Stage 17 DB observability and backups: added db to Ansible managed inventory, installed node_exporter/postgres_exporter/Promtail on db, added Prometheus node/postgres targets, Grafana DB panels, DB alerts, PostgreSQL logs in Loki, pg_dump backup with sha256, restore test, and systemd timer.
current_next_stage: Stage 18 Telegram support bot: add a Telegram client that creates tickets through the same API v1 with source=telegram, logs to Loki, and later enables source-based product metrics.

product.name: MISIS_Digital Student Support
product.storage: PostgreSQL database supportdesk on db:5432; tables tickets and ticket_events

runtime.app_backend: Docker container on app:8080 via docker compose
runtime.database_backups: pg_dump -Fc daily via backup-supportdesk.timer at 03:15 MSK, retention 7 days, sha256 checksums, latest.dump symlink, restore test verified
